name: Loona, Relaxation Time
description:
"Finally. I was waiting for you dumbass. Let's get out of here, I'm bored..."

No little introduction this time, simply just cuddling with the hellhound, that's it.

And before you say anything, I did watch some of the show to make this. I don't like it, but I do what I have to do.

Since 2 won by a landslide, that is happening next. The problem however, is my creative juices are slowing down for this. So I'm gonna ask yall to...

Give me some ideas for it

It could be anything from the scenario for the original picture, or your own ideas if it's nothing too crazy. This doesn't guarantee I'll do that scenario, because I'll probably do another one if I think of one in time.

Here's the full image for you loveable idiots:

Anyway, I'm out

(Also shout out to the goat CrabRangoonie)
creator: RandomGold
